title: Nomads honour Gary Player
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS AND VIDEO - South...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Video","html":"Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS AND VIDEO - South African golfing legend Gary Player, who turned 90 on 1 November, was honoured by the Nomads Golf Club of South Africa at the Goose Valley Golf Club in Plett today.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS AND VIDEO - South African golfing legend Gary Player, who turned 90 on 1 November, was honoured by the Nomads Golf Club of South Africa at the Goose Valley Golf Club in Plett today."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Player is the last surviving founding member of Nomads Golf Club."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Together with Michael Florence and 104 other founding members, Player formed the Follow the Sun Nomads Golf Club in 1960.","html":"Together with Michael Florence and 104 other founding members, Player formed the Follow the Sun Nomads Golf Club in 1960."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Player played regular monthly games at his Nomads club in Johannesburg.","html":"Player played regular monthly games at his Nomads club in Johannesburg."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Nomads celebrated its 65th anniversary at Goose Valley this morning with a function where Dale Hayes was master of ceremonies.","html":"Nomads celebrated its 65th anniversary at Goose Valley this morning with a function where Dale Hayes was master of ceremonies."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Player, who is a native of Plett and designed the Goose Valley course, hit a shot at the 11th Par 3 with every fourball playing in the competition.","html":"Player, who is a native of Plett and designed the Goose Valley course, hit a shot at the 11th Par 3 with every fourball playing in the competition."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Video:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
